3191860.name: Cult -Vein-
3191860.description:
Description


Cult -Vein- is a psychological horror game set in an atmospheric world. Discover a twisted reality where nothing seems real. Use everything you can to escape this nightmare and unravel the story behind you.

Explore a world where every interaction has consequences, affecting both the environment and the player. The atmosphere will keep you on edge at all times.

Gameplay


Weapons might save you from the dreadful entities stalking you from the next corner, the next door, or beneath your feet — but they are always there. Such things cannot die. You’ll be able to pick up key items, interact with the environment, and search for anything that might help you escape this nightmare.

Storyline


Life is cruel.
Tressa no longer knows what’s real. Once again, the past is calling to her.

Explore a twisted world that hunts you down — where every interaction carries consequences. Witness the life of a marginalized woman, trapped between illusion and reality, in a world consumed by terror and tragedy.

How


In Cult -Vein-, you will witness firsthand how a horrific past can haunt you. Entities will follow your every move, watching you from every corner and stalking you from windows and streets. You will grapple with what’s real and what’s not as you discover your past, present, and future. Reconnect with the deepest moments of your life and escape from your nightmares to uncover the truth.

The World


Get lost in a twisted world that can amaze you with stunning graphics and a lot of bizarre situations, pulling you deeper into a life full of madness. The nightmares (dark entities) will play tricks on your mind and try to hunt you.

The Core Gameplay


  • Search everything (e.g., drawers)
  • Exploration with puzzle solving
  • Interact with the dark entities
  • Pick up key elements and interact with them (e.g., pick up a book and insert it into the drawer)
  • Interact with the environment (plants, photos, lights, etc.)
3191860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
